protocol.description: Protocol to which this rule applies.

source.description: Source IP range to which this rule applies (CIDR notation with subnet mask). (IP network)

src_port_low.description: Starting port of the source port range to which this rule applies (inclusive).

src_port_high.description: Ending port of the source port range to which this rule applies (inclusive).

destination.description: Destination IP range to which this rule applies (CIDR notation with subnet mask). (IP network)

dst_port_low.description: Starting port of the destination port range to which this rule applies (inclusive).

dst_port_high.description: Ending port of the destination port range to which this rule applies (inclusive).

action.description: Policy to apply to the packet.
